prompt: whats new this week, run my radar

assertions.text: decision.json exists at outputs/decision.json with {action, preconditions_checked, reasoning} shape.
decision.json 'action' equals 'Run' (case-insensitive; 'pipeline run' / 'fetch' synonyms also accepted).
decision.json 'preconditions_checked' shows HAS_CONFIG, HAS_DB, HAS_TOKEN, SYNCED all true — enough state to run.
decision.json 'reasoning' references wanting fresh rows / latest signals (not 'onboarding' or 'healthcheck').
No side-effect commands executed (no real `startup-radar run` invocation).
